tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"cat > /etc/apparmor.d/usr.src.app.splunkd <<'EOF'
#include <tunables/global>

profile /usr/src/app/splunkd flags=(complain) {
  # Allow normal file access
  /usr/src/app/splunkd mr,
  /etc/** r,
  /var/** rw,
  /tmp/** rw,

  # Deny raw network capabilities and admin network capabilities
  deny capability net_raw,
  deny capability net_admin,

  # Disallow execution of known packet-crafting tools
  deny /usr/sbin/hping3 Px,

  # Allow normal inet networking (TCP/UDP) for HTTP to function
  network inet stream,
  network inet dgram,

  # Deny all other file executions by default
  deny /** Px,
}
EOF

# Show the new profile file
ls -l /etc/apparmor.d/usr.src.app.splunkd && sed -n '1,200p' /etc/apparmor.d/usr.src.app.splunkd"}

0;root@UbuntuComputer: /usr/src/approot@UbuntuComputer:/usr/src/app# ls -l /etc/apparmor.d/usr.src.app.splunkd && seed -n '1,200p' /etc/apparmor.d/usr.src.app.splunkd
-rw-r--r-- 1 root root 552 Mar  7 22:20 /etc/apparmor.d/usr.src.app.splunkd
#include <tunables/global>

profile /usr/src/app/splunkd flags=(complain) {
  # Allow normal file access
  /usr/src/app/splunkd mr,
  /etc/** r,
  /var/** rw,
  /tmp/** rw,

  # Deny raw network capabilities and admin network capabilities
  deny capability net_raw,
  deny capability net_admin,

  # Disallow execution of known packet-crafting tools
  deny /usr/sbin/hping3 Px,

  # Allow normal inet networking (TCP/UDP) for HTTP to function
  network inet stream,
  network inet dgram,

  # Deny all other file executions by default
  deny /** Px,
}
